global.description: The ad features a dark background with a prominent sale message and a call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with a discount offer.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that sets a dramatic tone for the ad.

elements.label: Flash sale headline
elements.description: Bold, prominent text stating 'Flash sale live' in a large font.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers text
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline that reads 'Shop bestsellers now' in a clear font.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A noticeable badge displaying '-30%' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer' designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: ThreadMark logo
elements.description: A simple logo design featuring the text 'ThreadMark' in a stylized font.

elements.label: Decorative icon
elements.description: A small decorative icon that complements the overall design.

elements.label: Bottom area
elements.description: The lower section of the ad that contains various elements and text.

elements.description: The upper section of the ad that includes the logo and other elements.
